display.purpose: H1 de hero fotográfico e taglines principais.

headline.purpose: H2 de seção e títulos de bloco CTA.

title.purpose: H3 de cards de hotel e benefícios.

label.purpose: Hero eyebrow único e categorias em cards — uso moderado.

shadows.name: header-glow
shadows.purpose: Sombra roxa difusa sob header branco sticky.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Elevação neutra no hover de cards.

shadows.name: dest-card-glow
shadows.purpose: Glow tintado em cards de destino e badges flutuantes.

shadows.name: cta-block-glow
shadows.purpose: Glow roxo sob bloco CTA gradiente.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Ken Burns hero background, transições de cor.

motion.name: ease-expo
motion.purpose: Entradas stagger do hero, pop do mascote, reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: CTA principal de conversão — WhatsApp, falar com Tuki.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #FC7B04; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 16px 32px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px color-mix(in srgb, #FC7B04 28%, transparent); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E94F1B; transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FC7B04; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ação em cards de propriedade — reservar, cotar.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; background: #4B14AE; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #270A78; transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4B14AE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Inverse Button
components.description: CTA sobre blocos gradiente — telefone, email.
components.css: .ds-btn-inverse { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #FFFFFF; color: #4B14AE; padding: 16px 32px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-inverse:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-btn-inverse:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFFFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: CTA secundário sobre hero fotográfico roxo.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #FFFFFF; padding: 16px 32px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFFFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #4B14AE; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(75, 20, 174, 0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4B14AE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Property Card
components.description: Card de hotel/resort na grid da home.
components.html:
Olímpia, SP

Resort

Enjoy Olímpia Park Resort

Consulte
components.css: .ds-card-property { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 16px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(75, 20, 174, 0.08); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); transition: box-shadow 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 280ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card-property:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-property__media { position: relative; display: flex; height: 13rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(75, 20, 174, 0.2), rgba(252, 123, 4, 0.15)); } .ds-card-property__badge { position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #6E6685; } .ds-card-property__body { padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-card-property__category { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #4B14AE; } .ds-card-property__title { margin-top: 4px; font-family: Nunito, Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1F1545; } .ds-card-property__price { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #FC7B04; } .ds-card-property .ds-btn-secondary { margin-top: 12px; }

components.name: CTA Block
components.description: Bloco final de conversão com gradiente roxo→laranja.
components.html:
Pronto pra próxima aventura?

Fale com a Tuki no WhatsApp — resposta em até 2 minutos.
components.css: .ds-cta-block { border-radius: 24px; padding: 3rem 2rem; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4B14AE 0%, #6B2FD4 48%, #E94F1B 100%); box-shadow: 0 22px 55px color-mix(in srgb, #4B14AE 28%, transparent); } .ds-cta-block__title { font-family: Nunito, Inter, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 3vw, 2.25rem); font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .ds-cta-block__subtitle { margin: 1rem auto 0; max-width: 36rem; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .ds-cta-block .ds-btn-inverse { margin-top: 2rem; }

components.name: Lead Form Input
components.description: Campo de formulário de lead com focus ring roxo.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-input-label { margin-bottom: 4px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #1F1545; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9CA3AF; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4B14AE; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(75, 20, 174, 0.2); }

components.name: Site Header
components.description: Header sticky branco com logo colorido e nav em tinta suave.
components.html:
Tuki Viagens
OlímpiaRio QuenteNordeste
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; height: 60px; padding: 0 24px; background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(75, 20, 174, 0.08); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px color-mix(in srgb, #4B14AE 6%, transparent); } .ds-header__logo { font-family: Nunito, Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #4B14AE; } .ds-header__nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-header__nav a { padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6E6685; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-header__nav a:hover { background: #F4F1FF; color: #4B14AE; } .ds-btn-primary--sm { padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Floating Badge
components.description: Badge pill flutuante no hero — branco ou laranja.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-badge--white { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F1545; border: 1px solid rgba(75, 20, 174, 0.1); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px color-mix(in srgb, #1F1545 18%, transparent); } .ds-badge--orange { background: #FC7B04; color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 16px 35px color-mix(in srgb, #270A78 18%, transparent); }

narrative.overview: O sistema visual da Tuki Viagens traduz leveza familiar em superfícies saturadas e confiantes — não em neutros quentes genéricos. Roxo e laranja carregam identidade em heróis, gradientes e blocos de conversão; fundos off-white e lavender frios dão respiro sem cair no cream editorial. O header branco com logo colorido ancora navegação limpa; o hero fotográfico com mascote Tuki concentra personalidade e prova social.
keyCharacteristics: Hero fotográfico com overlay roxo, mascote circular e badges flutuantes
Header branco sticky; CTAs laranja pill com glow; CTA final em gradiente roxo→laranja
Sombras tintadas (color-mix roxo/ink) em vez de ghost cards pretos
Motion expo-out com stagger no hero; reduced-motion desliga Ken Burns

rules.name: The Five-Color Rule
rules.body: Roxo, laranja e branco são âncoras; lavanda/off-white são neutros derivados da marca (tint frio, não warm). Não introduzir terceiros acentos sem aprovação.

rules.name: The Orange-Action Rule
rules.body: Laranja aparece em CTAs, preços, stats e marquee — não como fundo de seção inteira. Roxo carrega identidade; laranja carrega clique.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: Proibido fundo cream/sand/beige quente. Off-white #FBFBFF e lavender #F4F1FF são permitidos — frios, com leve tint roxo.

rules.name: The Display-Body Pair Rule
rules.body: Nunito em display (h1–h3); Inter em corpo e UI. Não misturar outras famílias.

rules.name: The Readable-Ink Rule
rules.body: Corpo usa tuki-ink (#1F1545) sobre off-white/branco — nunca gray-400/500.

rules.name: The Tinted-Glow Rule
rules.body: Sombras de marca usam color-mix com roxo, laranja ou ink — nunca rgba(0,0,0,0.15+) com blur ≥ 16px junto a borda cinza.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Superfícies em repouso são planas ou com glow sutil de marca. Sombra neutra aparece só em hover de card ou menu mobile overlay.

dos: Do usar as cores base como âncora: roxo, laranja, branco + neutros lavanda frios.
Do colocar CTAs primários em laranja pill com glow sobre fundos roxos, brancos ou gradientes.
Do manter tom divertido-familiar: mascote, copy leve, prova social antes do formulário.
Do usar hero fotográfico com overlay de marca — a foto carrega desejo de viagem.
Do respeitar WCAG 2.1 AA — contraste ≥4.5:1, foco visível, prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't usar estética SaaS/startup — hero com métricas gigantes como único gancho.
Don't cair em cara de IA (slop) — fundo cream/sand/beige, eyebrows em caps em toda seção, glassmorphism decorativo, gradient text.
Don't usar header roxo sólido com logo branco — o padrão atual é header branco com logo colorido.
Don't empilhar borda cinza + sombra preta blur ≥ 16px — use glow tintado de marca.
